title: Banking sector sensitivity
content: Private banks in India are often sensitive to RBI policy rate changes, credit growth trends, and net interest margin compression risks.

title: IT services earnings drivers
content: Indian IT companies are influenced by US demand trends, deal wins, attrition changes, and margin guidance commentary.

title: Valuation interpretation
content: P/E should be interpreted with growth durability, return on capital, and sector cycle context instead of in isolation.

title: Portfolio risk basics
content: Concentration in a single sector increases drawdown risk; diversification across sectors and market caps can reduce volatility.

title: NSE and BSE basics
content: NSE and BSE are India's primary exchanges. Stocks can have NSE symbols and BSE scrip codes mapped to the same company and ISIN.

title: SEBI role in market regulation
content: SEBI regulates securities markets, disclosure standards, insider-trading rules, and investor-protection requirements.

title: Core market calculations
content: Common market calculations include absolute return, CAGR, volatility, drawdown, and risk-adjusted ratios such as Sharpe.

title: Stock analysis checklist
content: Stock analysis combines fundamentals, technical trend, volume behavior, earnings quality, sector positioning, and event risk.

title: Prediction guardrails
content: Stock prediction should be probabilistic, include uncertainty bounds, and avoid guaranteed-return claims while citing data recency.
